entities.name: MECEM
entities.context: Framework for meeting documentation; executive synthesis is noted exception for readability

entities.name: B40
entities.context: Block for capturing Key Strategic Decisions including tactical decisions and interrelationships

entities.name: B41
entities.context: Block for Next Steps; uses cross-references to B40 to avoid context duplication

entities.name: B42-B46
entities.context: Blocks containing Intelligence Highlights for synthesis

entities.name: B47
entities.context: Block for Open Strategic Questions; only unresolved items, resolved debates go to B40

entities.name: B01-B31
entities.context: External stakeholder blocks including DETAILED_RECAP and STAKEHOLDER_INTELLIGENCE; never generated for internal meetings

entities.name: Executive Synthesis
entities.context: Document type for major internal meetings ≥30min with significant strategic decisions; executive narrative 500-1000 words

entities.name: Future V
entities.context: Intended reader perspective for executive synthesis; written for reading 3 months later

entities.name: Cross-reference format
entities.context: Notation system using [B##.ID#] to link between blocks without duplicating context

relationships.context: Executive synthesis is only exception to MECEM framework for readability
